final:
// // This comment suggests the module handles division correctly even when the denominator is zero.
module divider_2bit (
    input [1:0] numerator,
    input [1:0] denominator,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (denominator == 2'b00) begin
            quotient = 2'bxx; // Undefined behavior
            remainder = 2'bxx; // Undefined behavior
        end else begin
            quotient = numerator / denominator;
            remainder = numerator % denominator;
        end
    end
endmodule
